description:
Evaluate the inter-radicular space between the lower right canine (#27) and first premolar (#28) in the 'Mandible_Demo.bsp' project for a potential TAD (Temporary Anchorage Device) placement. As an orthodontist planning to distalize the canine, measure the narrowest horizontal distance between the roots at the mid-root level (approximately 5mm below the crest). Capture a screenshot of the measurement view clearly showing the roots and the measurement line. Document the findings in a report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tad_safety_report.txt' using the following format:

Measurement: X.X mm
Conclusion: [Safe/Risky]
(Safe if > 3.0mm, Risky if <= 3.0mm)
